models.label: LayerD BiRefNet
models.why: Hair/outfit are usable candidates, but accessory/keypose masks are broad.

models.label: BiRefNet
models.why: All four packs passed runtime and simple mask gates with no broad-mask issues.

models.label: BiRefNet HR
models.why: All four packs passed and it is the best default for full-pack alpha cleanup.

models.label: BiRefNet matting
models.why: Hair/outfit/accessory passed, but keypose became near full-canvas and must not be used there.

models.label: SAM2 tiny ROI
models.why: Runtime passed, but strict visual QA detected cropped or fragment masks.

models.label: SAM2 large ROI
models.why: Large model did not improve the ROI crop/fragment failure pattern.

models.label: Fashion SegFormer
models.error: Can't load image processor for 'Itbanque/fashion_segformer'. If you were trying to load it from 'https://huggingface.co/models', make sure you don't have a local directory with the same name. Otherwise, make sure 'Itbanque/fashion_segformer' is the correct path to a directory containing a preprocessor_config.json file
models.why: The current HF repo cannot be loaded by the default Transformers image-segmentation pipeline.

models.why: The current HF repo is not directly loadable by Transformers without a custom legacy wrapper.

base_mannequin.use: Keep the two-piece rig underlayer: chest and pelvis covered, abdomen visible.
base_mannequin.next_action: Use as the stable mannequin target for pack fitting.

hair_pack.use: Full-pack alpha cleanup, then separate hair-specific splitter for front/side/back/tips.
blocked_by: No actual 18+ strand-level hair split yet.
hair_pack.next_action: Run hair band/contour splitter on the selected BiRefNet HR mask.

outfit_pack.use: Full-pack alpha cleanup for outfit pieces; semantic Fashion SegFormer is not selected.
blocked_by: No proven semantic outfit label split from Fashion SegFormer.
outfit_pack.next_action: Use geometry/ROI splitter for sleeves, top, frills, ribbons on BiRefNet HR alpha.

accessory_pack.use: Use only as full-pack alpha cleanup for now.
blocked_by: Current SAM2 ROI outputs are cropped/fragments.
Small accessories are too dense for the current layout.
accessory_pack.next_action: Regenerate or relayout accessory pack with larger spacing, then retry connected-component or SAM2 ROI.

keypose_asset_pack.use: Use only as full-pack alpha cleanup for now; do not split final eye/mouth states from current SAM2 output.
blocked_by: Current SAM2 ROI outputs are cropped/fragments.
keypose_asset_pack.next_action: Regenerate as separate eye keypose pack and mouth keypose pack with larger spacing and no overlap.
